name: Ladybird

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It lowers its head and bites straight ahead at close range.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block from the front or back out before it reaches hugging range.
attacks.notes: A short-range hit that often serves as the bridge into stronger attacks.

attacks.name: Running Charge
attacks.tell: It pulls back slightly before charging in a straight line.
attacks.howToAvoid: Sidestep it at the last moment.
attacks.notes: It is faster and hits harder than a normal ladybug charge.

attacks.name: Side Hit
attacks.tell: It turns its body to sweep with its side and shell.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not linger at its flanks after blocking the charge.
attacks.notes: It covers the exact space where many players try to punish.

attacks.name: Back Buck
attacks.tell: It lifts its back end to shake off anyone tailing too closely.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not stay directly behind it for long after a dodge.
attacks.notes: It punishes players who try to farm free damage from behind.

attacks.name: Slam Combo
attacks.tell: It rears up on its hind legs and lunges forward twice in quick succession.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not punish after the first impact; wait out the second lunge first.
attacks.notes: Its signature move and the easiest way for it to stun you into a follow-up.

description: An aggressive ladybug variant that dominates much of the upper yard. It is faster, tougher, and far more dangerous than its neutral counterpart.
behavior: It roams like a normal ladybug and even sleeps under dandelions when it finds them. In combat it keeps almost all of the same moves, but adds a far more punishing double lunge.
interactionWithPlayer: It is hostile on sight and hits hard enough to break the player's rhythm even through blocks. Its double lunge especially punishes anyone who reacts late to the first hit.
interactionWithCreatures: It shares the usual ladybug habits: it often bothers aphids and defends itself from almost anything that provokes it, but does not actively hunt large creatures.
strategy: Fresh remains the most comfortable answer. The fight is won by reading the charge correctly and not punishing too early: several animations end in a second hit that punishes greed.
respawnInfo: 2 days by default. In the shed surroundings it takes 3 days.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Bite: 90
Running Charge: 150
Side Hit: 130
Back Buck: 130
Slam Combo: 100

specialTraits: Its double lunge and long charge can still stun you hard even through a shield if they connect cleanly.
